request.prompt:
Determine whether MONSTA X has any publicly announced events after 2026-07-15 (concerts, tours, or fan meetings). Search for this artist only; do not bundle another artist.

Strict evidence rules: accept only an official artist/company source, promoter, venue, ticketing source, or reliable media. Exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence. Do not guess. A general tour announcement without a dated stop is not an event. If no qualifying public event is found, return NO_EVENTS_FOUND.

For every event you claim, the artist must match and you must provide the complete exact date or date range, venue, city/country, and a structured web-search citation with URL, title, and cited text that directly supports that same event. Do not claim an event without a citation.

Return only these fields in this order:
VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND | NO_EVENTS_FOUND
EVENT_COUNT: <n>
EVENTS:
- ARTIST: ...
  DATES: ...
  VENUE: ...
  CITY_COUNTRY: ...
  SOURCE_CLASS: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media
  CITATION_URL: ...
  CITED_TEXT: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

content.text: I'll search for MONSTA X upcoming events using multiple reliable source types simultaneously.

input.query: MONSTA X official schedule event announcement 2026

content.text:
Strong, multi-source evidence found. The Live Nation Newsroom press release (official promoter), Ticketmaster (official ticketing), Billboard (reliable media), MSG venue page (official venue), and MONSTA X's own official X/Twitter account all confirm the same 10-stop North American leg. Below is the full structured report.

**VERDICT:** EVENTS_FOUND
**EVENT_COUNT:** 10

---

**EVENTS:**

**DATES:** October 3, 2026
**VENUE:** EagleBank Arena
**CITY_COUNTRY:** Fairfax, VA, USA
**SOURCE_CLASS:** promoter
**CITATION_URL:** https://newsroom.livenation.com/news/global-superstars-monsta-x-announce-north-american-dates-on-world-tour-the-x-nexus/
**CITED_TEXT:**

citations.cited_text: Global superstars MONSTA X today announced North American dates on their 2026 MONSTA X WORLD TOUR [THE X : NEXUS]. Promoted by Live Nation, the newly ...

content.text: "Global superstars MONSTA X today announced North American dates on their 2026 MONSTA X WORLD TOUR [THE X : NEXUS]. Promoted by Live Nation, the newly added shows kick off Saturday, October 3 in Fairfax, VA at EagleBank Arena."

content.text: On April 6, Starship Entertainment officially unveiled the North American schedule for the "2026 Monsta X World Tour [The X: Nexus]" through the group's social media channels
, with all 10 dated stops confirmed across Live Nation (official promoter), Ticketmaster (official ticketing), Billboard (reliable media), and the MSG venue page.
